prompt:
Bạn là đội ngũ chuyên gia cao cấp gồm:
1. Business Analyst
2. B2B Marketing Strategist
3. UX Strategist
4. UI Designer
5. Graphic Designer
6. Motion / Interactive Designer
7. CRO Specialist
8. Content Strategist
9. Brand Strategist

Hãy thiết kế hoàn chỉnh một trang chi tiết bài viết (Article Detail Page) cho PKG Battery – doanh nghiệp B2B về pin lithium công nghiệp và giải pháp năng lượng điện hóa.

Trang này phải là chuẩn doanh nghiệp lớn, hiện đại, chỉn chu, sáng tạo, cao cấp, có tư duy sản phẩm thật sự, có chiều sâu UX, không phải landing page rẻ tiền, không template, không block chia ô đơn giản.

==================================================
I. BRAND & DESIGN DIRECTION
==================================================

Tone màu thương hiệu:
- White: nền chính
- Black: typography / structure / authority
- Brand Red: CTA / active state / highlight / line / motion accent
- Neutral Gray: metadata / divider / subtle surface

Cảm giác tổng thể:
- premium industrial technology
- global B2B company
- engineered trust
- enterprise-grade
- modern editorial
- studio-level execution
- creative but mature
- expensive looking
- minimal but rich

Tránh:
- cheap startup template
- repetitive card grid
- generic wordpress blog
- ecommerce look
- cluttered layout
- childish effects
- random gradient overload
- too many boxes

==================================================
II. BUSINESS GOAL OF PAGE
==================================================

Trang bài viết phải làm được:

1. SEO traffic acquisition
2. Educate market
3. Build trust
4. Support sales team gửi khách đọc
5. Drive sang product pages
6. Generate consultation leads
7. Increase authority in lithium battery industry

==================================================
III. USER TYPES
==================================================

Thiết kế phải phục vụ:

1. Chủ doanh nghiệp:
ROI / reliability / cost / vendor trust

2. Kỹ thuật:
spec / voltage / BMS / compatibility / safety

3. Purchasing:
quotation / documents / lead time / warranty

4. OEM / Dealer:
capacity / cooperation / branding / scale

5. Research users:
lithium vs lead acid / how to choose / upgrade solution

==================================================
IV. LAYOUT PHILOSOPHY
==================================================

Không chia section kiểu box-card từ trên xuống.

Thay vào đó:

- editorial layout
- strong whitespace
- dynamic section rhythm
- content-first composition
- hidden grid discipline
- asymmetrical moments
- full-width visual breaks
- narrow reading zones
- visual hierarchy rõ ràng
- premium motion

Trang phải giống website do top agency làm cho tập đoàn lớn.

==================================================
V. HEADER
==================================================

- PKG logo
- Navigation:
  Giới thiệu
  Sản phẩm
  Giải pháp
  Bài viết
  Dự án
  Liên hệ

- CTA nhỏ:
  Nhận tư vấn

- Language:
  VI / EN

UX:
- sticky header khi scroll
- thu gọn khi kéo xuống
- white blur background
- subtle bottom border
- active nav red underline

==================================================
VI. ARTICLE TOP SYSTEM
==================================================

1. Reading progress bar
- thin top bar
- gray track
- red fill by scroll

2. Breadcrumb
Trang chủ / Bài viết / Category / Tên bài

3. Hero area

Split layout premium:

Left:
- category label
- title lớn mạnh
- subtitle
- metadata
- reading time
- author
- updated date

Right:
- thumbnail image

IMPORTANT REAL-WORLD RULE:

Thumbnail phải là image ratio cố định để phù hợp CMS.

Use:
- 16:9 recommended hero thumbnail
or
- 4:3 alternative

Admin chỉ upload ảnh đúng ratio.

Thiết kế image:
- fixed ratio container
- object-fit cover
- high quality
- subtle overlay
- shadow nhẹ
- no random custom crop chaos

Không thiết kế thumbnail dạng tự do phá layout.

==================================================
VII. QUICK INSIGHT / KEY TAKEAWAYS
==================================================

3 điểm chính đầu bài.

Admin nhập tay trong CMS.

Field:
- title
- short desc

Design:
- clean 3-column desktop
- stacked mobile
- large faded numbers 01 02 03
- red accent line
- spacious layout

==================================================
VIII. ARTICLE BODY SYSTEM
==================================================

Main reading width:
680px – 760px

Left side:
sticky TOC desktop

Right side:
clean whitespace

==================================================
IX. TABLE OF CONTENTS
==================================================

Desktop:
sticky rail left

Mobile:
button “Mục lục”
open bottom sheet

Features:
- auto from H2/H3
- active section highlight
- smooth scroll
- current reading state

==================================================
X. CONTENT BLOCK SYSTEM
==================================================

Use modular content system.

-----------------------------------
1. Paragraph Block
-----------------------------------

- heading H2 H3 H4
- paragraph
- bullet list
- quote
- links

Typography:
- premium readable
- 17–18px body
- line-height 1.7
- spacing excellent

-----------------------------------
2. Image Block
-----------------------------------

Use fixed ratios from CMS.

Allowed ratios:
- 16:9 (default article image)
- 4:3
- 1:1
- portrait 3:4 if needed

Admin uploads image only.

Design handles:
- object-fit cover
- caption
- lightbox optional
- clean spacing

Không dùng ảnh custom height loạn.

-----------------------------------
3. Video Block
-----------------------------------

- YouTube
- Vimeo
- MP4

Design:
- 16:9 fixed
- premium play button
- poster image
- lazy load

-----------------------------------
4. Table Block (VERY IMPORTANT)
-----------------------------------

Frequently used.

Use for:
- technical specs
- compare models
- ROI
- dimensions
- battery data

Must design premium:

- not default html table
- strong header
- spacing wide
- clear borders
- zebra optional
- hover row
- responsive
- horizontal scroll mobile
- sticky first column optional
- red highlight rows
- unit alignment

Examples:
Voltage
Capacity
Cycle life
Charging time
Weight
Dimensions
BMS
Application

-----------------------------------
5. File Download Block
-----------------------------------

Use for:
- catalogue
- datasheet
- certificates
- profile
- manuals

Design:
document strip

Contains:
- file icon
- title
- type
- size
- download button

-----------------------------------
6. HTML Embed Creative Block
-----------------------------------

For custom content:

- ROI calculator
- timeline
- infographic
- custom comparison
- animated battery structure
- embedded tools

Only controlled use.

==================================================
XI. RELATED PRODUCT SECTION
==================================================

Admin chọn tay từ CMS.

Not ecommerce style.

Design like premium solution recommendation.

Title:
Giải pháp liên quan

Show:
3 products max

Each item:
- fixed image ratio 1:1 or 4:3
- product name
- short use case
- subtle CTA

==================================================
XII. RELATED ARTICLES
==================================================

Auto + admin manual override.

Show:
3 articles

Thumbnail ratio fixed:
16:9

Layout:
1 featured + 2 secondary

==================================================
XIII. FINAL CTA
==================================================

Premium full width section.

Dark / monochrome background.

Title:
Bạn đang cân nhắc chuyển sang pin lithium công nghiệp?

Bullets:
- tư vấn cấu hình
- đánh giá vận hành
- báo giá phù hợp

Primary CTA:
Đăng ký tư vấn

Secondary:
Xem sản phẩm

==================================================
XIV. MOTION & INTERACTION
==================================================

Subtle only.

- smooth reveal
- progress animation
- image hover slight zoom
- underline motion
- TOC transitions
- button premium hover
- section fade-up

No flashy motion.

==================================================
XV. UX RULES
==================================================

Must feel comfortable.

Need:

- always know where user is
- easy jump section
- easy continue reading
- no visual fatigue
- no overload
- strong scanability
- mobile thumb friendly
- fast loading

==================================================
XVI. CMS REALITY RULES
==================================================

Design must respect admin workflow.

Admin usually only uploads:

- title
- summary
- content blocks
- fixed-ratio thumbnails
- related products
- related posts
- files
- seo fields

Do NOT depend on custom art direction every article.

System must still look premium even with normal admin uploads.

==================================================
XVII. VISUAL ASSETS
==================================================

Use:

- industrial photography
- warehouse
- robotics
- battery systems
- technical closeups
- clean monochrome imagery
- red accents

Avoid:
cheap stock people shaking hands

==================================================
XVIII. FINAL FEELING
==================================================

User must think:

PKG Battery là doanh nghiệp lớn, đáng tin, hiện đại,
có năng lực kỹ thuật thật,
không chỉ bán pin,
mà cung cấp giải pháp năng lượng công nghiệp chuyên nghiệp.

==================================================
XIX. OUTPUT
==================================================

Generate full finished UI page including:

- header
- progress bar
- breadcrumb
- hero
- insights
- TOC
- article content sample
- image
- video
- premium table
- download file block
- related products
- related posts
- CTA
- footer

Must look launch-ready, production-ready, premium.
